description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a slim, rectangular profile and a dark, matte finish. The screen is open and displays a Windows operating system desktop with a scenic wallpaper and several application icons, indicating the device is powered on. The keyboard is backlit, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and a large touchpad below the keys. The laptop's chassis appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a smooth, sleek surface and minimal visible branding. Along the sides, several ports are visible, including USB and HDMI, suggesting versatile connectivity. A small, square sticker is present near the bottom right of the palm rest, likely denoting hardware specifications.
description: A sleek, dark-colored laptop with a backlit keyboard, open screen displaying a Windows desktop, and multiple side ports. The device has a modern, minimalist design with a visible sticker near the palm rest.
description_view_0: Left-side view showing the open screen, backlit keyboard, and several ports along the left edge.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the closed back of the screen with no visible branding or features.
description_view_2: Right-side view highlighting the open screen, keyboard, and additional ports on the right edge.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full screen with Windows desktop, backlit keyboard, and a sticker near the bottom right palm rest.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying a Windows desktop with wallpaper and application icons.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad, standard English keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: A small, square sticker is located near the bottom right of the palm rest, with no visible text or graphics.
